title: CivOptimized
description: The essential modpack for CivMC. Optimal performance and utility.
body:
![civoptimized modpack logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce13f16bec6fb5ec3a5665f67bbf9de5b92c3b92.png)

The essential modpack for CivMC.

**Disclaimer - Follow all CivMC server rules when using this modpack.**

**InventoryProfilesNext includes a config to disable hotbar potion refill. Do not re-enable.**

Personally, I prefer JourneyMap as my map mod which comes with this pack. CivModern alternatively can be used as the map (Press R to open this menu) You might have to disable one or the other to prevent overlap.

Includes all the amazing performance-enhancing mods of Fabulously Optimized as well as hand-picked visual and utility enhancements.

Recommended resource packs and shaders:

[Faithful 64x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-64x)

[FreshAnimations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)

- [Faithful 64x Fresh Animations Patch](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/compatibility-patch-for-faithful64x-freshanimations)

- [Faithful 64x Appleskin Addon](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-64x-appleskin-addon)

[Complementary Shaders - Reimagined]([https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined/version/latest](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined))

or [Complementary Shaders - Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound)

**Recommended to use Prism Launcher with Java 25 or 26.**

**Contact Jacob43365 in the Winterbourne Discord for issues or suggestions.**

[![Built on Fabulously Optimized](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/built-with/fabulously-optimized_46h.png)](https://download.fo)

![civoptimized logo cutout](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/972e25772bfc83dc74528858a42e5fbd68a0c6c3_0.webp)
